{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8711456?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DarkaMaul", "id": 8711456, "login": "DarkaMaul", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg3MTE0NTY=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-674", "name": "Uncontrolled Recursion"}], "description": "The SurrealDB type/kind parser did not enforce the configured recursion depth limit when parsing nested type annotations. The expression parser already enforced the limit for analogous constructs; the kind parser omitted it. An authenticated attacker could send a query with deeply nested type annotations (e.g., `array<option<array<option<...>>>>`) and exhaust server memory, crashing the process.

This is an incomplete fix for [GHSA-6r8p-hpg7-825g](https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/security/advisories/GHSA-6r8p-hpg7-825g), which addressed the same class of bug in the expression parser but did not cover the kind/type annotation parser code path.

### Impact

An authenticated user with query execution privileges can crash a SurrealDB server with a single WebSocket message containing deeply nested type annotations.

### Patches

A patch has been introduced that wraps `parse_concrete_kind` and the `OPTION<...>` arm of `parse_inner_kind` with `enter_object_recursion!`, bounding the recursive cycle `parse_concrete_kind → parse_inner_kind → parse_inner_single_kind → parse_concrete_kind` at the configured `object_recursion_limit` (default 100). Regression tests cover both cast and `DEFINE FIELD` paths.

- Versions 3.1.0 and later are not affected by this issue.

### Workarounds

Restrict the ability of untrusted users to execute arbitrary queries via the `--deny-arbitrary-query` capability flag for the affected user classes (guest, record, or system). Disabling untrusted access to the WebSocket `/rpc` endpoint also prevents exploitation; the HTTP `/sql` endpoint's 1 MiB body limit constrains nesting to a depth where OOM is not feasible.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q8qp-67f9-wr3f", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T20:05:14Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8qp-67f9-wr3f", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q8qp-67f9-wr3f"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T20:05:14Z", "references": ["https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/security/advisories/GHSA-q8qp-67f9-wr3f", "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/commit/61d509b766afdf67cc26d8203fd7dc583c8d77aa", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8qp-67f9-wr3f"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/surrealdb/surrealdb/security-advisories/GHSA-q8qp-67f9-wr3f", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb", "summary": "SurrealDB vulnerable to Denial of Service due to nested types annotations", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T20:05:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8qp-67f9-wr3f", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "surrealdb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: SurrealDB vulnerable to Denial of Service due to nested types annotations
